info.title: BoringCache API
info.description:
Simple, fast, and reliable cache management API for development workflows.

The BoringCache API provides endpoints for managing workspaces, cache entries,
performance metrics, and session information. Built for high performance with
built-in caching, rate limiting, and multipart upload support.

## Authentication
All API endpoints require a valid API token passed in the Authorization header:
```
Authorization: Bearer your-api-token-here
```

## CLI Format Support
BoringCache API uses a simplified tag-only format:
- **Save**: `TAG` format (e.g., "ruby-3.4.4-darwin-arm64")
- **Restore**: `TAG` format (e.g., "ruby-3.4.4-darwin-arm64")
- **Platform Tags**: Tags automatically include platform suffixes (darwin-arm64, linux-x64, windows-x64)

get.description: Check the overall health status of the API and its dependencies
Retrieve the OpenAPI 3.0 specification in JSON format
Retrieve the OpenAPI 3.0 specification in YAML format
Validate current API token and retrieve session details
Retrieve all workspaces accessible to the current API token
Retrieve detailed information about a specific workspace

Retrieve cache entries for a workspace with pagination support.
Can also be used to restore multiple cache entries by providing keys parameter.

parameters.name: entries
parameters.description:
Comma-separated list of restore entries in TAG format.
Example: "ruby-deps,node-deps"

post.description:
Create a new cache entry and get upload URL(s).
Accepts a single cache entry per request. Files larger than 50MB will use multipart upload.

200.description: Cache entry already exists; returning existing metadata

delete.description: Delete one or more cache entries by tag name.

entries.description: Array of cache tags to delete

200.description: Delete results returned for each tag

post.description:
Fast preflight check to determine if cache manifests exist.
Checks multiple manifests in a single request and returns download URLs for hits.

get.description:
Retrieve manifest metadata for a cache entry without downloading the full manifest payload.
Supports optional lookup by manifest root digest and CBOR streaming when requested via `Accept`.

parameters.name: by_digest
parameters.description: Manifest root digest to look up first; falls back to tag lookup when not available

410.description: Manifest is no longer available for this cache entry

post.description: Submit manifest metadata to determine if cache already exists before uploading data.

parameters.name: tag
parameters.description: Cache tag that will be written if the upload proceeds

get.description:
Get download URL for a cache entry by key hash or tag.
Supports both direct key lookup and tag-based lookup.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Cache key hash or cache entry ID

parameters.name: tag
parameters.description: Tag name for semantic lookup (alternative to key-based lookup)

patch.description:
Confirm successful upload and update cache entry metadata.
Used for both single and multipart uploads.

post.description: Finalize a multipart archive upload by providing the upload ID and part ETags.

parameters.name: cache_entry_id
parameters.description: Cache entry ID associated with the multipart upload

409.description: Upload ID mismatch or invalid state

post.description: Submit performance and telemetry data from CLI operations

bearerAuth.description: API token in the format `bc_user_uuid:secret` or `bc_org_uuid:secret`

Unauthorized.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API token

NotFound.description: Not found - Resource does not exist

example.details: No workspace found with slug: invalid-workspace

details: No workspace found with slug: invalid-workspace

tag.description: Name of the tag that was processed

error.description: Error message when the delete operation failed

valid.description: Whether the current token is valid

id.description: Workspace slug (used as ID in API responses)

total_cache_size.description: Total size of all cache entries in bytes

status.description: Cache status - hit (found), miss (not found), pending (uploading)

manifest_root_digest.description: Root digest of the manifest (for cache hits)

manifest_digest.description: Digest of the manifest file (for cache hits)

manifest_url.description: Presigned manifest download URL (for cache hits)

archive_urls.description: Array of presigned download URLs for archive parts (empty for miss, 1..n for hit)

metadata.description: Summary information for the cache entry

error.description: Error message when cache lookup failed

tag.description: Primary tag assigned to the entry

manifest_root_digest.description: SHA-256 digest of the manifest root

total_size_bytes.description: Total size of archive in bytes (required for timeout calculation)

uncompressed_size.description: Aggregate uncompressed size of files in bytes

file_count.description: Number of files represented in the manifest

expected_manifest_digest.description: SHA-256 digest of the CBOR manifest payload expected to be uploaded

expected_manifest_size.description: Size in bytes of the manifest payload expected to be uploaded

manifest_upload_url.description: Presigned manifest upload URL (absent when cache already exists)

archive_urls.description: Array of presigned upload URLs. Always contains at least one URL. For single-part uploads, contains one URL. For multipart uploads, contains one URL per part. IMPORTANT - To determine if multipart is required, check multipart_upload_id, not array length.

multipart_upload_id.description: Identifier required to complete multipart uploads. Present (non-null) ONLY when multipart upload is required. Use this field (not archive_urls length) to detect multipart mode.

manifest_etag.description: Storage ETag for the manifest object when available

error.description: Error message when the save request fails

tag.description: Primary tag associated with the manifest

manifest_etag.description: Storage ETag for the manifest object

file_count.description: Number of files represented in the manifest

manifest_url.description: Presigned URL to download the manifest payload

last_uploaded_at.description: Timestamp when the manifest was last uploaded

manifest_root_digest.description: Manifest root digest for the prospective upload

compression_algorithm.description: Compression algorithm that will be used for archive

total_size_bytes.description: Total prospective size of the cache entry in bytes

file_count.description: Number of files represented in the manifest

expected_manifest_digest.description: SHA-256 digest of the CBOR manifest payload expected to be uploaded

expected_manifest_size.description: Size in bytes of the manifest payload expected to be uploaded

cache_entry_id.description: Cache entry identifier reserved for this upload

manifest_root_digest.description: Manifest root digest evaluated during preflight

exists.description: Whether the cache entry already exists with this manifest

manifest_upload_url.description: Presigned URL for uploading the manifest payload

manifest_etag.description: Storage ETag for an existing manifest (when exists is true)

archive_urls.description: Array of presigned download URLs for archive parts (1..n based on size)

manifest_digest.description: SHA-256 digest of the uploaded manifest payload

manifest_size.description: Size of the uploaded manifest in bytes

manifest_etag.description: Storage ETag of the uploaded manifest for verification

archive_digest.description: SHA-256 digest of the uploaded archive payload

archive_size.description: Size of the uploaded archive in bytes

archive_etag.description: Storage ETag of the uploaded archive for verification

file_count.description: Number of files in the cache

upload_id.description: Identifier returned when presigned multipart URLs were issued

archive_size.description: Total compressed size of the archive in bytes

etag.description: Storage ETag returned from the upload_part call

archive_etag.description: Final storage ETag returned after completing the multipart upload

manifest_root_digest.description: The manifest root digest that was checked

manifest_url.description: Presigned manifest download URL if exists

archive_urls.description: Array of presigned download URLs for archive parts (empty for miss, 1..n for hit)

size.description: Cache size in bytes if exists

content_hash.description: SHA256/SHA512 hash for content integrity verification

cache_efficiency.description: Percentage of time saved by cache hit

timestamp.description: Timestamp when health check was performed
